description: Create a precision template for a 22-fret electric guitar fretboard in LibreCAD (Millimeters). The drawing must include layers 'OUTLINE' (White), 'FRETS' (Red), 'INLAYS' (Cyan), and 'CENTERLINE' (Yellow). The 'FRETS' layer consists of 22 vertical lines at X-coordinates: 36.37, 70.70, 103.10, 133.68, 162.55, 189.79, 215.51, 239.79, 262.70, 284.32, 304.73, 324.00, 342.18, 359.35, 375.55, 390.84, 405.27, 418.90, 431.76, 443.89, 455.35, and 466.16. The 'OUTLINE' layer defines a tapered fretboard shape with a 43mm nut width (X=0, Y from -21.5 to 21.5) and a 56mm heel width (X=466.16, Y from -28 to 28). The 'INLAYS' layer contains 6mm diameter circles centered horizontally between frets 3, 5, 7, 9, 15, 17, 19, and 21 on the Y=0 centerline, and two dots at Y=12 and Y=-12 for fret 12. Save the template to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/fretboard_template.dxf.
